name: deadline-demon
description: Arm session deadlines and nudge AI agents to finish on time (optional hard enforcement)

interface.shortDescription: Session deadline nudges for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Arm a per-session deadline with /deadline or /deadline-hard, get remaining-time context each turn, and optionally block non-wrap-up tool calls after time runs out.
defaultPrompt: Arm a deadline for this task.
